pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Maven compiler source and target from Java 8 to Java 21 to support the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Codebase likely uses Java 21 features (e.g., records, pattern matching, virtual threads) or dependencies that require Java 21; compiling with Java 8 settings would cause compilation errors or runtime incompatibilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot version to 3.4.1, which requires Java 17+ and uses Jakarta EE namespaces.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x is incompatible with Java 8 and requires Jakarta EE 9+ (javax.* -> jakarta.*); using older Spring Boot versions or Java 8 would cause classpath conflicts and compilation errors.
